subtitle: We're here to help 24/7
noStay: You do not have an active stay. Please book a room to access direct hotel support.
placeholderUnavailable: WhatsApp messaging is unavailable for this hotel

faq.q: How do I request early check-in?
faq.a: Head to the 'Home' tab on your dashboard. If you have an upcoming stay, you can use the 'Request Service' button to notify the hotel of your arrival time.
Tap your active stay card on the Home dashboard to see all property amenities and your booked room details, or open the Trips tab to view your full booking history.

faq.q: How do I download my invoice?
faq.a: Open the 'Trips' tab from the bottom menu and select your past or current stay to view the Stay Details page. From there, tap 'Download Invoice' under your Bill Summary to get a PDF copy.

faq.q: How do I redeem my rewards?
faq.a: The Vaiyu Rewards programme is currently being revamped. Once active, your eligible stays will automatically earn points that can be redeemed at checkout or when booking your next stay through the platform.
